issues.description: Missing protective effect: 'None of your Characters can be K.O.'d by effects until the start of your next turn' is not represented in DSL. This is a critical part of the card's On Play effect.
Action sequence is incomplete. The protection effect must come before DrawCard and TrashFromHand, with proper duration 'UntilStartOfNextTurn' to match 'until the start of your next turn'.
